column1: Luis Arraez leads the slate with unmatched reliability, hitting safely in nearly 78% of games and benefiting from the leadoff spot, a favorable park, and the platoon edge against Michael Wacha. Curtis Mead also stands out with a strong hit probability, a recent surge, and a premium park boost in a righty-friendly matchup. CJ Abrams and James Wood offer additional upside in solid environments but lack Arraez’s steady track record. Jeremy Peña remains a dependable option at home atop Houston’s lineup.
